title: {{name}}'s Pony Paddock
intro: Welcome to the paddock, {{name}}! The ponies are ready for a morning of careful thinking.

activities.title: Pony Apple Share
activities.instructions: The ponies love sharing apples fairly between friends.
activities.prompt: There are 8 apples and 2 ponies. If they share equally, how many apples does each pony get? Draw the share.
activities.illustrationHint: Two gentle ponies beside an apple basket

activities.title: Stable Story Sentence
activities.instructions: Tell the stable hand what happened this morning in one clear sentence.
activities.prompt: Write a sentence about a pony jumping a small fence.
activities.answerSpaceHint: Capital letter, full stop, clear idea.
activities.illustrationHint: A pony mid-jump over a rustic fence

activities.title: Tens in the Tack Room
activities.instructions: Bridles hang in tens — spot the groups of ten.
activities.prompt: Circle groups of ten horseshoes. How many tens did you find? How many left over?
activities.answerSpaceHint: Circle tens, then write tens and leftovers.
activities.illustrationHint: Rows of horseshoes on a wooden wall

closingNote: Give the ponies a pat — {{name}} worked hard in the paddock today.
